This GitHub OpenAI Codex discussion is worth reviewing.
Although it does not directly address the issues with the VS Code Codex extension, it likely represents part of the underlying foundation required to support a more robust solution.
I recommend reading the entire thread, as several important details are embedded within some of the replies.
